name: portfolio_alignment
description: Assess alignment between strategic portfolio goals and operational execution. Identify misalignment, resource conflicts, and priority gaps.
intent: Evaluate portfolio-level goal alignment and resource allocation

inputs.name: portfolio_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for portfolio scope

agentInstructions: Read all goals within the portfolio scope, evaluate alignment with declared strategic priorities, identify resource conflicts and priority gaps. Provide recommendations with evidence citations.
